input_dict.question: Who won the 2016 Russian national silver medal with another Russian ice dancer born 29 April 1995?
input_dict.source_summary: Victoria Sinitsina won the 2016 Russian national silver medal with Nikita Katsalapov.
input_dict.target_summary:
Evidence summary:
- Victoria Alexandrovna Sinitsina (born 29 April 1995) is a Russian ice dancer.
- Nikita Gennadyevich Katsalapov (born 10 July 1991) is a Russian ice dancer.
- With Victoria Sinitsina, Nikita Katsalapov is the 2016 Russian national silver medalist.

These facts link the 29 April 1995–born ice dancer (Victoria Sinitsina) to the 2016 Russian national silver-medal result with partner Nikita Katsalapov.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Victoria Sinitsina (29 April 1995) won the 2016 Russian national silver medal with Nikita Gennadyevich Katsalapov (10 July 1991).
